_comment: Maps group-1 warp-pad EXIT names to native LevelIDs (pad physical LevelID == target track LevelID). LevelIDs sourced from rom_db_mapping.json trackIDs and confirmed against spec 2026-06-22 MVP Phase-2 §0. 'kind' classifies the pad for unlock-randomization eligibility: race/crystal are randomizable; cup/trial are native-fixed (type:0). 'bootstrap':true marks the always-open N. Sanity Beach starter race pads that MUST stay reachable from an empty inventory so trophies can be earned; these are never given a randomized unlock requirement (solvability backbone). 'vanilla_trophies' is the per-pad trophy floor enforced in warppad_unlock_requirements=vanilla mode (issue #80): transcribed from ctr-native-ap game/zGlobal_DATA.c metaDataLEV[levelID].numTrophiesToOpen — the native vanilla fallback in ap/ap_hooks.c ctr_cfg_warp_unlocked (AH_WarpPad.c:810/1865). This JSON is the SINGLE SOURCE; Rules.add_vanilla_floor_rules reads it and a topology test guards parity against a retyped copy of the native table. Only race pads carry a floor: native gates arenas on hub keys (GetKeysRequirement), not trophies, and trials/cups on relics/gems/tokens.
